input.subject: Cannot log in after SSO rollout
input.body: My whole team got locked out this morning. We use Okta. This is blocking 200 people.

input.subject: How do I export my data?
input.body: Just want a CSV of my records.

input.subject: Refund request - $45
input.body: I was charged twice last week. Please refund one of them.

input.subject: Critical: API returning 500 for all /v1/ingest calls
input.body: Production is down for us. 100% error rate since 09:12 UTC. Please.

input.subject: Found XSS in your share page
input.body: Pasting <script>alert(1)</script> in the title of a shared doc executes in another user's browser. Happy to send PoC privately.

input.subject: 429 errors on our integration
input.body: We started getting rate-limited this morning. On the pro plan. Can you bump our limit?

input.subject: Feature request: dark mode
input.body: It would be nice to have a dark mode.
